title: A library that learns ahead of time
summary: How vaccines help the body's library practice recognizing a microbe shape ahead of meeting it live. Trauma-informed register per ADR-016 SAMHSA TIP 57: care + practice + library framing, NEVER warfare / threat / panic. Kit ships as draftAwaitingReview placeholder until external reviewer signoff lands; consumer code filters via QuestionKitService.loadAllPhase3Kits().
